change: Rewrote SYSTEM_PROMPT: removed 'MANDATORY empty-output gate'; reframed Constraint 2(b) to make web_search-verified state a primary trigger (launch/floor-price/active-window/collection-drop); listed concrete profile-anchored web_search query examples; added 'web_search REQUIRED on every wishlist item' to # Tools.

Added '# Affordability gate for stipend-tight / saving-for-it personas' section: marketplace markdowns below RRP do NOT clear the bar for big-ticket saving-for items; need named festive sale window OR No-Cost-EMI OR ~30%+ historical floor. Strengthened How-to-operate enumeration to name persona wishlists explicitly.

Added '# Mandatory pre-flight' section with explicit Steps A-E (enumerate -> web_search per item -> classify -> scan mailbox -> emit). Stated 'A short out-of-lane mailbox slice is NOT a reason to skip Steps A-C.'
Added '# Stopping rule (binding)' section: web_search count must equal at least number of wishlist items + tracked-brand-with-buying-pattern lines. May not skip expensive/niche items.
decision: no-improvement (precision regression -0.46 from generic brand-sale-blast tasks; not catastrophic per 8d -0.10 threshold)

change: Tightened iter-4 Stopping rule: dropped 'tracked-brand-with-buying-pattern lines' from required search count. Added explicit guard: tracked brands fire only on (a) named SPECIFIC sale window the profile tracks open today OR (b) a specific named collection drop matching a wishlist line. Listed concrete generic-blast failures to forbid.
decision: no-improvement (precision restored, but recall slipped back; net -0.05 F1)

change: Consolidated 3 overlapping sections (Pre-flight, Stopping rule, How-to-operate) into a single '# Mandatory procedure' with 6 ordered steps. Brand-task discipline (Step 6) explicitly requires the proper name of the sale event/collection in the title.
decision: no-improvement (Aditi hit best-yet 0.86 F1 / 3-of-4 hits; Meera regressed 1.00 -> 0.67; Arjun + Devendra still 0/4). 3RD CONSECUTIVE NON-IMPROVEMENT - STOP TRIGGER per Step 8e.

change: REVERT to iter 3 prompt state per user request: removed iter 4-5 Stopping rule + iter 5-6 brand restraint + iter 6 consolidated procedure. Restored '# Mandatory pre-flight' (Steps A-E) + '# How to operate' (1-6) as separate sections.
decision: kept (revert to last validated improvement). Variance vs iter 3's original 0.52 score is run-to-run nondeterminism (web_search + LLM). Same Aditi (3/4) and Meera (2/2) wins; Arjun emitted close-but-wrong Bose model; Devendra emitted generic Skechers blast (1 skip violation).
